schema.description: Extracts structured fields from customer support emails

intent.description: The primary intent of the customer's email

urgency.description: How urgently the customer needs a response, inferred from tone and content

order_number.description: Order ID, invoice number, or transaction reference mentioned in the email (e.g. ORD-12345)

error_message.description: Any error message, error code, or stack trace snippet the customer has copied into the email

affected_feature.description: The product feature or area the customer is writing about (e.g. 'checkout', 'dashboard', 'API')

summary.description: One-sentence plain English summary of the customer's issue or request
